expectations.text: model_and_parts_created: Script creates a model with two shaft parts connected to ground via revolute joints
expectations.evidence: Creates .gear_coupler model, input_shaft and output_shaft parts, with rev_input and rev_output revolute joints to ground

expectations.text: coupler_constraint_used: constraint create complex_joint coupler is used (NOT 'constraint create coupler' — must include 'complex_joint' sub-command)
expectations.evidence: 'constraint create complex_joint coupler' with coupler_name = .gear_coupler.coupler_gear is present

expectations.text: motion_multipliers_correct: motion_multipliers = 1.0, -0.333 (or equivalent 3:1 ratio with opposite direction sign)
expectations.evidence: motion_multipliers = 1.0, -0.333 giving a 3:1 ratio with opposite sign

expectations.text: motion_generator_created: constraint create motion_generator is used on the input joint
expectations.evidence: 'constraint create motion_generator' with joint_name = .gear_coupler.rev_input is present

expectations.text: type_of_freedom_rotational: Motion generator specifies type_of_freedom = rotational
expectations.evidence: type_of_freedom = rotational in the motion_generator block

expectations.text: time_derivative_velocity: Motion generator specifies time_derivative = velocity
expectations.evidence: time_derivative = velocity in the motion_generator block

expectations.text: uses_havsin_not_step: HAVSIN function is used for the ramp (not STEP or STEP5)
correct_havsin_argument_order: HAVSIN argument order is (x, x0, x1, h0, h1) = (TIME, 0.0, 0.5, 0.0, 120D)
converts_to_radians_or_uses_D: 120 degrees/s expressed correctly (as 120D or converted to rad/s)
expectations.evidence: 120D used directly in the HAVSIN expression

expectations.text: geometry_present: At least one geometry shape (cylinder or similar) added to each shaft part
expectations.evidence: geometry create shape cylinder for both input_shaft.cyl_shaft and output_shaft.cyl_shaft

expectations.text: dot_path_names: All object names use full dot-path hierarchy
expectations.evidence: All names use full paths e.g. .gear_coupler.input_shaft.cm, .gear_coupler.rev_input, etc.
No adams_id parameter found anywhere in the script

expectations.text: simulate_transient: Script uses simulation single_run transient command
expectations.evidence: 'simulation single_run transient' with end_time=2.0 and number_of_steps=2000 is present

expectations.text: adams_view_no_errors: CMD script runs in Adams View without any ERROR: lines in aview.log
expectations.evidence: No ERROR: lines found in aview.log
